stages.name: Coordinator
stages.role: pipeline-orchestrator drives the full pipeline autonomously. pipeline-guide answers routing questions. quality-gate runs between every stage. brief-validator checks chapter inputs before writer fires.

stages.name: Market Research
stages.human_gate_instruction: Review MARKET-INTELLIGENCE.md and COMPETITIVE-ANALYSIS.md. Set market_intelligence_approved: true in pipeline-state.json when satisfied.

stages.name: Blueprint & Architecture
stages.agent_selection: novel-writer for FICTION and FICTION-MYSTERY, book-architect for NONFICTION-*
stages.human_gate_instruction: Review BLUEPRINT.md — chapter plan, protagonist, structure, series arc. Set blueprint_approved: true when satisfied.

stages.name: Design & Production
stages.human_gate_instruction: Review exports/final/cover-kdp.jpg and FINAL-APPROVAL-REPORT.md (must score 270+/300). Set both fields true when approved.

stages.name: Publishing Setup & Launch
stages.agent_note: conversion-copywriter-agent drafts the blurb/hook/A+/ad/email copy FIRST; publisher-agent places the recommended blurb in the KDP listing.
stages.human_gate_instruction: Review KDP draft. Complete AI questionnaire. Set ai_questionnaire_confirmed: true. Then type PUBLISH to trigger final click.

stages.name: Series Management
stages.note: series-continuity-guardian MUST run first — locks Book N facts before series-manager updates the master

chapter_pipeline.description: Mandatory sequential pipeline for EVERY chapter — no exceptions

automation.stage_10_note: Weekly post-launch scheduling requires GitHub repo + CCR remote triggers. Set up git repo first, then schedule weekly agents via /schedule skill.

gates._comment: Machine-readable contract consumed by scripts/validate-state.cjs and scripts/advance.cjs. Keyed by the stage keys used INSIDE each book's pipeline-state.json 'stages' object. required_outputs = glob patterns (relative to the book dir) that MUST resolve to >=1 file before a stage may be marked complete. gate_in = human_gates fields that MUST be true before this stage may BEGIN. severity governs the validator: CRITICAL blocks; WARN reports but does not block.

06-production._note: EPUB is enforced conditionally by INV-10 (only when kdp_editions.kindle != false) so paperback-only books are not false-blocked; PDF is universal (every edition has it). Format eligibility for any Kindle edition is enforced by INV-14.

invariants._comment: Hard rules enforced by validate-state.cjs regardless of how state was produced (manual edit, agent bug, mid-stage crash). CRITICAL = exit nonzero, Stop hook blocks the turn. WARN = reported only.

INV-1.desc: No stage may be 'complete' if an earlier stage is not 'complete'.

INV-2.desc: Every concrete path in a complete stage's state.outputs[] must exist on disk.

INV-2b.desc: Each gates.required_outputs glob for a complete stage must match >=1 file.

INV-3.desc: current_stage must equal the furthest-advanced stage index.

INV-4.desc: No completed stage work may sit on an unmerged stage-* branch.

INV-5.desc: No 'PENDING ... APPROVAL' string in a doc whose stage is complete.

INV-6.desc: human_gates.published may be true ONLY if publishing.asin is set AND ai_questionnaire_confirmed is true.

INV-7.desc: If 06-production is complete, quality_scores.book_reviewer_avg >= 96 AND fact_check_result == 'PASS'.

INV-8.desc: A stage that has begun must have had all its gates.gate_in human_gates true. (WARN, not CRITICAL — prep-ahead is permitted; publish itself is locked by INV-6.)

INV-9.desc: If 06-production is complete, quality_scores.final_approval_score must be >= 270.

INV-10.desc: If 06-production is complete, exports/final/manuscript-kdp.epub must exist AND be >= 500KB.

INV-11.desc: No manuscript *copyright*.md may contain 'AI Disclosure' or 'drafted with the assistance of AI'.

INV-12.desc: If a stage is complete but any of its gates.required_outputs is missing, that is CRITICAL (not WARN).

INV-14.desc: If a Kindle edition is declared (kdp_editions.kindle != false) or an EPUB exists, the manuscript must pass scripts/format-eligibility.cjs — no blank fill-in lines (>20), empty checkboxes (>10), blank tracker tables (>0), or banned-as-Kindle keywords (coloring/puzzle/blank-journal/etc). Blank-journal/workbook/coloring/puzzle content is PAPERBACK-ONLY on KDP. This is the rule that catches the 2026-06-21 vagus-nerve rejection. Re-route to paperback (kdp_editions.kindle:false) or build a blank-free Kindle variant + companion PDF. Implemented in validate-state.cjs (Stop-hook) and pre-stage-gate.cjs (pre-flight, stage >= 6).

kdp_editions_schema._comment: Optional object in each book's pipeline-state.json declaring which KDP editions ship. Drives INV-10 (EPUB required only if kindle != false) and INV-14 (format eligibility enforced whenever a Kindle edition is declared/built). If absent, kindle defaults to true (standard ebook+paperback). Set kindle:false for any fill-in workbook/journal/planner/log/coloring/puzzle book — these are paperback-only on KDP.
kdp_editions_schema.rule: For any format built on blank fill-in space (workbook, journal, planner, log book, coloring, puzzle): kindle MUST be false unless a separate blank-free prose/example Kindle variant is built. The blank worksheets ship as a downloadable companion PDF, not inside the Kindle file.

stage_completion_rule._comment: Only the pipeline-orchestrator may mark a stage complete. A stage object in pipeline-state.json with status 'complete' MUST carry executed_by: 'pipeline-orchestrator'. Any other value (or absence) means an unauthorised actor closed the stage.
